help.short: The fully qualified Azure Resource manager identifier of the resource.

json.schema:
<prop type="array" name="and">
<prop type="array" name="values" required="True">
<prop type="array" name="contactEmails" required="True">
<prop type="array" name="contactGroups">
<prop type="array" name="contactRoles">

command.name: delete
command.confirmation: Are you sure you want to perform this operation?

help.short: The fully qualified Azure Resource manager identifier of the resource.

command.name: create

help.short: The fully qualified Azure Resource manager identifier of the resource.
eTag of the resource. To handle concurrent update scenario, this field will be used to determine whether the user is updating the latest version or not.
The end date for the budget. If not provided, we default this to 10 years from the start date.
The start date for the budget.

command.argGroup:
<arg type="array" var="$parameters.properties.filter.and" options="and">
<arg type="array" var="@BudgetComparisonExpression_create.values" options="values" required="True">
<arg type="array" var="$parameters.properties.notifications{}.contactEmails" options="contact-emails" required="True">
<arg type="array" var="$parameters.properties.notifications{}.contactGroups" options="contact-groups">
<arg type="array" var="$parameters.properties.notifications{}.contactRoles" options="contact-roles">

json.schema:
<prop type="array" name="and" arg="$parameters.properties.filter.and">
<prop type="array" name="values" arg="@BudgetComparisonExpression_create.values" required="True">
<prop type="array" name="contactEmails" arg="$parameters.properties.notifications{}.contactEmails" required="True">
<prop type="array" name="contactGroups" arg="$parameters.properties.notifications{}.contactGroups">
<prop type="array" name="contactRoles" arg="$parameters.properties.notifications{}.contactRoles">

<prop type="array" name="and">
<prop type="array" name="values" required="True">
<prop type="array" name="contactEmails" required="True">
<prop type="array" name="contactGroups">
<prop type="array" name="contactRoles">

command.name: update

help.short: The fully qualified Azure Resource manager identifier of the resource.
eTag of the resource. To handle concurrent update scenario, this field will be used to determine whether the user is updating the latest version or not.
The end date for the budget. If not provided, we default this to 10 years from the start date.
The start date for the budget.

command.argGroup:
<arg nullable="True" type="array" var="$parameters.properties.filter.and" options="and">
<arg type="array" var="@BudgetComparisonExpression_update.values" options="values">
<arg type="array" var="$parameters.properties.notifications{}.contactEmails" options="contact-emails">
<arg nullable="True" type="array" var="$parameters.properties.notifications{}.contactGroups" options="contact-groups">
<arg nullable="True" type="array" var="$parameters.properties.notifications{}.contactRoles" options="contact-roles">

json.schema:
<prop type="array" name="and">
<prop type="array" name="values" required="True">
<prop type="array" name="contactEmails" required="True">
<prop type="array" name="contactGroups">
<prop type="array" name="contactRoles">

<prop type="array" name="and" arg="$parameters.properties.filter.and">
<prop type="array" name="values" arg="@BudgetComparisonExpression_update.values" required="True">
<prop type="array" name="contactEmails" arg="$parameters.properties.notifications{}.contactEmails" required="True">
<prop type="array" name="contactGroups" arg="$parameters.properties.notifications{}.contactGroups">
<prop type="array" name="contactRoles" arg="$parameters.properties.notifications{}.contactRoles">
